name: Bug Report

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Console errors
If applicable, add screenshots or paste console output.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g. macOS 14, Ubuntu 24.04]
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 123]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11]
- Deployment: [e.g. local dev / Docker / edustream.co.in]

## Additional context
Any other context about the problem.
